explicit_text: My name Anoatubby is a warrior name within the Chickasaw Nation, meaning 'walk and kill.' It has deep roots, possibly going back to the 1700s and early 1800s, with a relative who was with Davy Crockett and worked alongside Andrew Jackson. The name connects me to my Chickasaw heritage and family history, including the Trail of Tears migration.

Over time, I grew interested in Chickasaw traditions, language, and culture, attending events like the Chickasaw Festival and learning about our history.
